title: Implement LLM fallback in HtnPlanner for un-decomposable goals
description:
## Problem
`HtnPlanner.PlanAsync` threw `InvalidOperationException("LLM fallback not yet implemented (Phase 4)")` when no decomposer or task-library method could handle a goal. This crashed the agent loop.

## Fix
Added real LLM fallback to `HtnPlanner`:
1. Accepts optional `ILlmProvider?` and `ToolDispatcher?` via constructor
2. New `TryLlmFallback(goal, state)` method constructs a prompt with goal info, world state, and available tools
3. Calls `ILlmProvider.CompleteAsync` and parses the JSON response into `ActionData[]`
4. New `ParseLlmActions` helper parses LLM JSON output
5. Falls back to throwing only if LLM is unavailable or fails

## Files
- `Agent.Planning/HtnPlanner.cs` — LLM fallback logic + `ParseLlmActions`
- `Agent.Planning/Agent.Planning.csproj` — added `Agent.Tools` reference
- `WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs` — inject `ILlmProvider` and `ToolDispatcher`

## Validation
- `dotnet build` — 0 warnings
- `dotnet test` — 746/746 passed
